headline: 2 Industrials Stocks with Exciting Potential and 1 Facing Headwinds
summary: Whether you see them or not, industrials businesses play a crucial part in our daily activities. They are also bound to benefit from a friendlier regulatory environment with the Trump administration, and this excitement has led to a six-month gain of 3.9% for the sector. Investing here would have been wise - at the same time, the S&P 500 shed 2.1% of its value.
